hooks.command: if grep -rq '= true$' /Users/andreyshulga/projects/experimental/axis/as.axis.dataminer/config/feature-flags.yaml 2>/dev/null; then printf '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Feature flag check failed: all flags must default to false in config/feature-flags.yaml"}'; exit 1; fi

cd /Users/andreyshulga/projects/experimental/axis/as.axis.dataminer && /Users/andreyshulga/projects/experimental/axis/as.axis.dataminer/.venv/bin/pytest tests/ -q --tb=short; RESULT=$?; if [ $RESULT -ne 0 ]; then printf '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Tests failed — fix before committing"}'; fi; exit $RESULT

COMMAND=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE '(^|/)sisyphus export'; then cd /Users/andreyshulga/projects/experimental/axis/as.axis.dataminer && /Users/andreyshulga/projects/experimental/axis/as.axis.dataminer/.venv/bin/sisyphus validate gilgamesh && /Users/andreyshulga/projects/experimental/axis/as.axis.dataminer/.venv/bin/sisyphus validate iliad && /Users/andreyshulga/projects/experimental/axis/as.axis.dataminer/.venv/bin/sisyphus validate mahabharata; fi
